tasks.label: scp-to-remote
tasks.command: ssh pavel@192.168.0.2 'killall -q -9 BMP580; rm -f /tmp/BMP580' && scp build/BMP580 pavel@192.168.0.2:/tmp

tasks.label: run-remote-gdbserver
tasks.command: ssh pavel@192.168.0.2 'killall -q -9 gdbserver BMP580; nohup gdbserver :9091 /tmp/BMP580 > /dev/null 2>&1 &'
